query: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(dataVenda, '%Y-%m') as mes, COUNT(*) as total_vendas, MIN(dataVenda) as primeira, MAX(dataVenda) as ultima FROM vendas GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(dataVenda, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY mes;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 41wMkRgfnqozYTj.root --database GsoitYr3hHiyZTgQLwp9sV --execute SELECT DATE_FORMAT(dataVenda, '%Y-%m') as mes, COUNT(*) as total_vendas, MIN(dataVenda) as primeira, MAX(dataVenda) as ultima FROM vendas GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(dataVenda, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY mes;
